title: Arsenal vs. Chelsea - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Arsenal have won their last three home league games against Chelsea, last winning more consecutively between 1990 and 1994. Chelsea are winless in their last eight Premier League games against Arsenal, their longest since a run of 19 between 1995 and 2005.

title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Wolves have lost 17 of their last 18 Premier League matches against Liverpool, winning the other 3-0 in February 2023 at Molineux under Julen Lopetegui. Liverpool have won 83% of their Premier League games against Wolves, winning 19 of 23 games – that is the best win ratio of any side to face another 20+ times in the competition’s history.

title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.

title: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Tottenham Hotspur have won 16 of their last 21 Premier League matches against Crystal Palace, although they have lost two of their last three against the Eagles. They have never won consecutive away league games against Spurs.
